error_signature: new lines not registering in email body
title: New lines not registering in Outlook email body
symptom: When sending an email from the Outlook node, new lines do not appear in the email body as expected. The output shows the text without any line breaks.
applies_when: Message Type is set to HTML
not_this_if: Message Type is set to Text
root_cause: When the Message Type is set to HTML, standard whitespace and new lines are ignored by the HTML rendering engine. This means that pressing 'Enter' does not create a new line in the email body as it would in plain text.
fix_steps: Change the 'Message Type' from HTML to Text

Alternatively, add
tags in the email body for new lines
Save the workflow and test the email again
agent_instruction:
Change the Message Type to Text or add
tags for new lines in the email body.
